data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon operates on a microservices architecture enabling scalability and independent service deployment.
data.technical_spec: Docker, Kubernetes, API Gateway, Service Mesh

data.title: Federated Data System
data.description: Data is distributed across various services to ensure high availability and fault tolerance.
data.technical_spec: NoSQL Databases, Data Sharding, S3 Storage

data.title: Scalable Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Built on AWS infrastructure for elastic scaling and avoiding downtime.
data.technical_spec: EC2, Auto Scaling Groups, Elastic Load Balancers

data.title: Continuous Deployment
data.description: Utilizes CI/CD pipelines for seamless deployment of services.

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Events trigger specific actions across the architecture to ensure real-time data processing.
